beats.intent: move from page context to disputed detail
beats.visual_action: App screenshot holds full context while the HyperFrames phone frame, source card, grid background, and small icon cluster guide attention toward the lower ad area

visual_cast.director_reason: The proof needs readable context first; support actors guide attention without turning the screenshot into wallpaper.

motion.entrance: continue from previous HyperFrames phone-frame position
motion.main: grid drifts slowly; source card settles; icon cluster ticks once; screenshot scales from 1.0 to 1.12 and shifts upward so ad slot approaches center

beats.density_note: readable dense: screenshot is stable; background, source card, icons, and camera add life without stealing focus
beats.why_not_ppt: the viewer travels from the real App page into the exact disputed ad slot instead of seeing a static label

beats.narration: 预警页下方出现了广告
beats.intent: lock attention on the disputed detail
beats.visual_action: HyperFrames-native red box draws around the ad slot; warning chip pops in; red keyword '广告' snaps beside the boxed region on the spoken word

visual_cast.director_reason: The moment needs a precise evidence lock and one keyword hit, not another full explanatory card.

beats.previous_text_behavior: text_ad_label holds beside the red box until the next contrast label enters, then stores as a small evidence chip instead of disappearing

motion.main: warning chip pops, keyword lands with small scale overshoot, red box pulses once then holds

beats.density_note: annotation, chip, and text are generated by HyperFrames and serve the screenshot; screenshot remains the focal proof
beats.why_not_ppt: the evidence is directed with zoom, lock, and attached label instead of being pasted as a static screenshot

beats.narration: 上一个关键词先让位，新的对比词变成主角
beats.visual_action: Previous flower text shrinks into the upper-right evidence chip while the new contrast label grows large in the open safe zone; proof card shifts only within readable guardrails

visual_cast.director_reason: The viewer keeps context from the prior keyword while the next spoken phrase gets a larger flower-word hit.

beats.previous_text_behavior: text_ad_label uses text.store_as_chip; text_normal_vip uses combo.blur_scale_in and becomes the new hero label

motion.entrance: new contrast label blur-scales in on the sync phrase
motion.main: previous text scales to 42% and moves to a side chip; proof shifts left by no more than 6% with source labels and table header still readable

beats.density_note: text memory stack adds rhythm without covering table cells
beats.why_not_ppt: sequential text is choreographed as persistent actors rather than replacing one subtitle with another
